channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tip, 29th April
item.description:
Recent

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Grovelands Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture, 29th April
item.description:
The chest of drawers was placed there about a week ago. The bathroom cabinet was placed there today. I suspect a nearby property purchased replacement furniture and placed these items for the broken furniture fairy to remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rodway Road, Plaistow, Bromley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: X1 large Tv dumped by 30 Ewart Road, 29th April
item.description:
X1 large Tv dumped by 30 Ewart Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ewart Road, Honor Oak, Sydenham, London Borough of Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleaning required, 29th April
item.description:
There is a lot of litter in the street, including glass, plastic and metal detrius.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 111,113, Woodside Lane, Blendon, London Borough of Bexley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New planted tree uprooted by wind, 29th April
item.description:
There was a nice new tree planted in this area, it was uprooted today (29 Apr) due to the strong wind.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salter Road, Rotherhithe, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 29th April
item.description:
Someone from another estate has come and fly tipped they’re stuff there

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Benthal Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress, 29th April
item.description:
Mattress dumped on street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brief Street, Loughborough Junction, London Borough of Lambeth

item.title: ///slip.stews.tens flytipping, 29th April
item.description:
Fly tipped in location ///slip.stews.tens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor Road Surface by Bus Stops, 29th April
item.description:
The road surface near the two bus stops named “Millennium Village South” is getting worse by the day. It seems like the centre of the road is sinking due to the weight of the buses and is therefore beginning to open up a hole in the middle of the road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southern Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pallets and metal cage, 29th April
item.description:
Paler and big metal cage left

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochford Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car been dumped for 3/4weeks now. Had several parking tickets. Rear window been smashed. Glass over floor., 29th April
item.description:
Car been dumped for 3/4weeks now. Had several parking tickets. Rear window been smashed. Glass all over floor.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): South Rise Way, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste & fly tipping left after authorised hours, 29th April
item.description:
Only 4 hours after my previous notification if water left on this corner, this is now the situation. The previous waste has been disposed of but new one has appeared. This is a problematic location for fly tipping and waste collection generally!!!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mountgrove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trade rubbish dumped on corner, 29th April
item.description:
Trade rubbish dumped on corner

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Elwill Way, Park Langley, Bromley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Four young trees dead….can they be replaced please?, 29th April
item.description:
Four young tree are dead.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81, Wickham Way, Park Langley, Bromley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sinkhole, 29th April
item.description:
This is actually a sinkhole that’s just appeared - very dangerous and caused an accident yesterday.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 250, Dacre Park, Blackheath, Lee, London Borough of Lewisham

item.title: On grass area bottom of Stuart road and Malvern road, 29th April
item.description:
Dumped sofa set and cushions large pile

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stuart Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: The young tree's roots need attention, 29th April
item.description:
The footway around the tree's roots needs to be repaired and the tree's roots need to be protected

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Fairway, Poverest, Orpington, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 29th April
item.description:
People dump rubbish here all the time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burton's Yard, Beckenham, Bromley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left clippings bag, 29th April
item.description:
Week 3-4 left by estate cleaner they also swept food waste up with leafs , so now the rats can go in for a meal !!! Needs removing asap , had pest control visit and he also insisted it removed asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Street, Elephant and Castle, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches wrapped in house Ariel, 29th April
item.description:
The branches of large tree has overgrown and tangled with house tv Ariel. Property address is 29 Cowden Road, orpington br6 0tp. I’m concerned it will pull Ariel down coursing damage to home and hurt any adult/child underneath. Property is by primary school and adult/child assisted living homes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayfield Avenue, Crofton, Orpington, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet
